// Zod 3 compat layer import * as core from "../core/index.js"; /** @deprecated Use the raw string literal codes instead, e.g. "invalid_type". */ export const ZodIssueCode = { invalid_type: "invalid_type", too_big: "too_big", too_small: "too_small", invalid_format: "invalid_format", not_multiple_of: "not_multiple_of", unrecognized_keys: "unrecognized_keys", invalid_union: "invalid_union", invalid_key: "invalid_key", invalid_element: "invalid_element", invalid_value: "invalid_value", custom: "custom", }; export { $brand, config } from "../core/index.js"; /** @deprecated Use `z.config(params)` instead. */ export function setErrorMap(map) { core.config({ customError: map, }); } /** @deprecated Use `z.config()` instead. */ export function getErrorMap() { return core.config().customError; }
